info.title: 6G-DALI MLOps Service Layer
info.description: Northbound AIaaS REST API for the 6G-DALI MLOps Service Management Layer. Covers five domains: Administration/Auth, Testbed, Model Catalogue, Training, and Deployment. Grounded in 3GPP TS 28.105.

post.description: Authenticate with username and password. Returns a short-lived access token and a long-lived refresh token.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token. The original refresh token remains valid until its expiry or an explicit logout.
Revokes the supplied refresh token. The access token expires naturally.

get.summary: List access policies for a project

put.summary: Replace full tools stack (must include all 3 mandatory tool types)

post.summary: Add an inference runtime to the stack

patch.summary: Update a tool's URI, name, or params

delete.summary: Remove a tool from the stack

post.summary: Get a pre-signed S3 URL to upload a model file

get.summary: Get a pre-signed S3 URL to download a model file

schema.title: Response Get Lineage Api V1 Catalogue Models  Entry Id  Lineage Get
Response List Datasets Api V1 Catalogue Datasets Get
Response Get Dataset Api V1 Catalogue Datasets  Dataset Path  Get

post.summary: Accept a training request and dispatch to orchestrator (admin)
Cancel a training request (admin or request owner)
Accept a deployment request and dispatch to orchestrator (admin)
Cancel a deployment request (admin or request owner)

DeploymentReportSummary.title: DeploymentReportSummary
DeploymentReportSummary.description: Compact report summary embedded in DeploymentProcessResponse.

testbed_id.title: Testbed Id
testbed_id.description: Testbed to run this deployment on

DeploymentRequestCreate.title: DeploymentRequestCreate
DeploymentRequestCreate.description: POST /deployment/requests — submit a new deployment request.

DeploymentRequestUpdate.title: DeploymentRequestUpdate
DeploymentRequestUpdate.description: PATCH /deployment/requests/{id} — admin can update before acceptance.

MLModelEntryCreate.title: MLModelEntryCreate
MLModelEntryCreate.description: POST /catalogue/models — register a new model entry (metadata only).

MLModelLifecycleState.title: MLModelLifecycleState
MLModelLifecycleState.description: DALI extension: lifecycle state of a model in the catalogue.

MLModelUpdate.title: MLModelUpdate
MLModelUpdate.description: Partial update for a model (e.g. updating paths after S3 upload).

OptimizationGoal.title: OptimizationGoal
OptimizationGoal.description: DALI training optimization objective, forwarded to Task Placement Engine.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.default: PUT your file directly to upload_url. Then PATCH this model entry with the resulting s3_key as onnx_path or weights_path.

ProcessStatus.title: ProcessStatus
ProcessStatus.description:
TS 28.105 progressStatus — used for both Training and Deployment processes.
Tracks actual orchestrator execution state.

RequestStatus.title: RequestStatus
RequestStatus.description: TS 28.105 requestStatus — used for both Training and Deployment requests.

TrainingReportSummary.title: TrainingReportSummary
TrainingReportSummary.description: Compact report summary embedded in TrainingProcessResponse.

testbed_id.title: Testbed Id
testbed_id.description: Testbed to run this training job on

TrainingRequestCreate.title: TrainingRequestCreate
TrainingRequestCreate.description: POST /training/requests — submit a new training request.

TrainingRequestSummary.title: TrainingRequestSummary
TrainingRequestSummary.description: Compact process summary embedded in TrainingRequestResponse.

TrainingRequestUpdate.title: TrainingRequestUpdate
TrainingRequestUpdate.description: PATCH /training/requests/{id} — admin can update metadata before acceptance.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: Public representation of a User (no password hash).
